news.title:
Elara Securities highlights India's 69% LNG import reliance on the Strait of Hormuz, posing risks to Petronet LNG, Gujarat Gas.
Petronet's Dahej terminal faces 76% Hormuz exposure; Gujarat Gas sees margin pressures with 73% LNG reliance.
news.summary:
Elara Securities highlights India's 69% LNG import reliance on the Strait of Hormuz, posing risks to Petronet LNG, Gujarat Gas.
Petronet's Dahej terminal faces 76% Hormuz exposure; Gujarat Gas sees margin pressures with 73% LNG reliance.

news.title:
Gujarat State Petronet Ltd (GSPL) faces a Rs. 45,000 fine plus GST by BSE for non-compliance with SEBI Regulation 17(1).
GSPL cites delayed government appointment of an Independent Director as reason, seeking waiver under SEBI's SOP Circular.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Petronet Ltd (GSPL) faces a Rs. 45,000 fine plus GST by BSE for non-compliance with SEBI Regulation 17(1).
GSPL cites delayed government appointment of an Independent Director as reason, seeking waiver under SEBI's SOP Circular.

news.title:
GSPL revised its merger scheme as per MCA directions, ensuring no impact on shareholder rights.
The scheme involves amalgamation, demerger of related firms to streamline operations and unlock value.
news.summary:
GSPL revised its merger scheme as per MCA directions, ensuring no impact on shareholder rights.
The scheme involves amalgamation, demerger of related firms to streamline operations and unlock value.

news.title:
Gujarat State Petronet released Q3 Dec 2025 unaudited results, including standalone and consolidated figures.
Board approved results on 22 Jan 2026; data available on the official website for investors.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Petronet released Q3 Dec 2025 unaudited results, including standalone and consolidated figures.
Board approved results on 22 Jan 2026; data available on the official website for investors.

news.title:
Gujarat State Petronet's Q3 net profit fell 1.5% to ₹256.7 crore; revenue dropped 2.7% to ₹4,091 crore.
EBITDA declined 1.2% to ₹613 crore, but margin improved to 15.8% from 15.5% QoQ.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Petronet's Q3 net profit fell 1.5% to ₹256.7 crore; revenue dropped 2.7% to ₹4,091 crore.
EBITDA declined 1.2% to ₹613 crore, but margin improved to 15.8% from 15.5% QoQ.

news.title:
Gujarat State Petronet Ltd's board meeting on 22nd Jan 2026 to approve Q3 FY25 unaudited financial results.
Trading window for equity shares closed from 1st Jan to 24th Jan 2026 as per insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Petronet Ltd's board meeting on 22nd Jan 2026 to approve Q3 FY25 unaudited financial results.
Trading window for equity shares closed from 1st Jan to 24th Jan 2026 as per insider trading regulations.

news.title:
GSPL's credit rating reaffirmed with a rating watch linked to merger plans with Gujarat Gas.
CARE rates GSPL's ₹300 crore bank facilities at AA; tariff cuts impact revenue despite strong market position.
news.summary:
GSPL's credit rating reaffirmed with a rating watch linked to merger plans with Gujarat Gas.
CARE rates GSPL's ₹300 crore bank facilities at AA; tariff cuts impact revenue despite strong market position.

news.title:
CARE Ratings affirmed CARE AA for Gujarat State Petronet Ltd with watch on developing implications.
Factors include FY25, H1FY26 updates, restructuring with Gujarat Gas Ltd, and demerger.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings affirmed CARE AA for Gujarat State Petronet Ltd with watch on developing implications.
Factors include FY25, H1FY26 updates, restructuring with Gujarat Gas Ltd, and demerger.

news.title:
Gujarat State Petronet appoints Lokesh Agarwal as CFO from Dec 2, 2025.
M.K. Das named Additional Director, replacing M.M. Srivastava; auditors set for FY 2025-26.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Petronet appoints Lokesh Agarwal as CFO from Dec 2, 2025.
M.K. Das named Additional Director, replacing M.M. Srivastava; auditors set for FY 2025-26.

news.title:
Gujarat State Petronet surged 7.8%, hitting Rs 313.25 intraday high on 2 Dec 2025.
The stock outperformed the gas sector and Sensex amid a mixed market backdrop.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Petronet surged 7.8%, hitting Rs 313.25 intraday high on 2 Dec 2025.
The stock outperformed the gas sector and Sensex amid a mixed market backdrop.

news.title:
Gujarat State Petronet's Q2 profit fell 7.4% YoY to ₹260.7 crore due to higher costs.
Revenue grew slightly by 1.1% YoY, while EBITDA dropped 12.2%, reducing margins to 15.5%.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Petronet's Q2 profit fell 7.4% YoY to ₹260.7 crore due to higher costs.
Revenue grew slightly by 1.1% YoY, while EBITDA dropped 12.2%, reducing margins to 15.5%.

news.title:
GSPL shared performance highlights based on unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 FY2025.
Presentation approved by the board is available on GSPL's website; meeting concluded at 05:10 PM.
news.summary:
GSPL shared performance highlights based on unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 FY2025.
Presentation approved by the board is available on GSPL's website; meeting concluded at 05:10 PM.

news.title:
Gujarat State Petronet approves investment in GSPL India Gasnet.
This investment focuses on enhancing gas transportation capabilities.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Petronet approves investment in GSPL India Gasnet.
This investment focuses on enhancing gas transportation capabilities.

news.title:
GSPL approves Rs. 35.77 Cr subscription to GIGL preference shares.
GSPL commits Rs. 7.8 Cr equity contribution; shareholding unchanged.
news.summary:
GSPL approves Rs. 35.77 Cr subscription to GIGL preference shares.
GSPL commits Rs. 7.8 Cr equity contribution; shareholding unchanged.

news.title:
Shri Pankaj Joshi resigned as Chairman & MD of Gujarat State Petronet Ltd due to superannuation.
Resignation effective 31st Oct 2025, notified under SEBI Regulation 30; resignation letter enclosed.
news.summary:
Shri Pankaj Joshi resigned as Chairman & MD of Gujarat State Petronet Ltd due to superannuation.
Resignation effective 31st Oct 2025, notified under SEBI Regulation 30; resignation letter enclosed.

news.title:
Gujarat State Petronet Ltd appoints Shri Jayant Misra as Independent Director w.e.f. 22nd Oct 2025.
Misra, a retired IRS officer, served as Chairman of Customs & Excise Settlement Commission, New Delhi.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Petronet Ltd appoints Shri Jayant Misra as Independent Director w.e.f. 22nd Oct 2025.
Misra, a retired IRS officer, served as Chairman of Customs & Excise Settlement Commission, New Delhi.
